channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17211] sanity-lfsck test_36a: MDS2 is not the expected 'completed'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for eaujames <eaujames@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/e21b4bca-6560-45bd-9d9d-22b4f2ed1353

test_36a failed with the following error:

(22) MDS2 is not the expected 'completed'

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/99525 - 4.18.0-477.21.1.el8_8.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/99525 - 4.18.0-477.21.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

Trigger layout LFSCK on all devices to find out orphan OST-object
CMD: onyx-78vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl lfsck_start -M lustre-MDT0000 -t layout -r -o
Started LFSCK on the device lustre-MDT0000: scrub layout
CMD: onyx-78vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0000.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
Waiting 32s for 'completed'
CMD: onyx-78vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0000.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
Waiting 32s for 'completed'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
Waiting 22s for 'completed'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
CMD: onyx-78vm13 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdd.lustre-MDT0001.lfsck_layout |
			awk '/^status/ { print \$2 }'
Update not seen after 32s: want 'completed' got 'scanning-phase2'
 sanity-lfsck test_36a: @@@@@@ FAIL: (22) MDS2 is not the expected 'completed' 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6686:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-lfsck.sh:5562:test_36a()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7026:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7082:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6912:run_test()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-lfsck.sh:5601:main()

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-lfsck test_36a - (22) MDS2 is not the expected 'completed'
item.summary: sanity-lfsck test_36a: MDS2 is not the expected 'completed'

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
